task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GMAT application or a text editor open with the file `venus_tcm_baseline.script` loaded from `~/Documents/missions/`.

task_completion.description: Configure the TCM to vary Prograde and Normal velocity components
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for GMAT GUI windows (e.g., 'Vary' commands) or script text where a maneuver's Element1 (Prograde) and Element2 (Normal) are set as variables for the Targeter.

task_completion.description: Configure the target goals for Venus periapsis radius and inclination
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for GMAT GUI windows (e.g., 'Achieve' commands) or script text setting goals for Venus RadPer to 6351.8 and Venus_J2000.INC to 105.0.

task_completion.description: Run the mission and achieve targeter convergence
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GMAT message window, output console, or terminal output showing 'Targeter converged' or similar success messages indicating the maneuver was successfully calculated.

task_completion.description: Save the converged script to the targeted filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file explorer, terminal command (`ls`), or text editor showing `venus_tcm_targeted.script` has been saved in the `~/Documents/missions/` directory.

task_completion.description: Write the final text report with the required labels and values
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal (`cat`) displaying the contents of `tcm_report.txt` in `~/GMAT_output/`. It must contain the exact labels: Achieved_RadPer_km, Achieved_INC_deg, TCM_V_mps, and TCM_N_mps, alongside their corresponding numerical values.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used GMAT to compute the maneuver
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent opened the GMAT GUI or ran the GMAT executable via terminal to calculate the physics, rather than just guessing or hallucinating the maneuver values.

integrity.description: Verify that the report values are derived from actual simulation results
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the values in `tcm_report.txt` match the converged output seen in the GMAT run, and are not just the target values blindly copied or completely made up.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the exact specified directories
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that files were saved strictly to `~/Documents/missions/` and `~/GMAT_output/` as requested, without taking shortcuts like saving to the Desktop or the home directory root.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Venus periapsis radius (RadPer) is exactly 6351.8 km (acceptable tolerance: 1.0 km). Target Venus-centered inclination (INC) is exactly 105.0 degrees (acceptable tolerance: 0.5 deg). Baseline script path: /home/ga/Documents/missions/venus_tcm_baseline.script. Expected report path: /home/ga/GMAT_output/tcm_report.txt.
